mapper.select:
SELECT A.AUTHOR_ID , A.AUTHOR_CODE , A.AUTHOR_NM , A.AUTHOR_DC , A.AUTHOR_USE , A.REGIST_DT , A.REGIST_ID , A.UPDT_DT , A.UPDT_ID FROM SWC_AUTHOR A
A.AUTHOR_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND A.AUTHOR_CODE = UPPER(#{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND A.AUTHOR_NM LIKE UPPER(#{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) + '%'
ORDER BY A.AUTHOR_CODE , A.AUTHOR_NM

SELECT U.USER_ID , IFNULL(UA.AUTHOR_ID, UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AS AUTHOR_ID , IFNULL(UA.AUTHOR_VALUE, 0) AS AUTHOR_VALUE , CASE WHEN UA.AUTHOR_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS AUTHOR_MAP , U.USER_LOGIN_ID , U.USER_NM , U.USER_IMAGE_URI , U.USER_SEXDSTN , U.USER_EMAIL , U.USER_USE , U.USER_LOCK , U.USER_LAST_LOGIN_DT , U.USER_DC , UA.REGIST_DT , UA.REGIST_ID , UA.UPDT_DT , UA.UPDT_ID FROM SWC_USER U LEFT JOIN SWC_USER_AUTHOR UA ON UA.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UA.AUTHOR_ID = UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) LEFT JOIN SWC_AUTHOR A ON A.AUTHOR_ID = UA.AUTHOR_ID ORDER BY U.USER_LOGIN_ID, U.USER_NM

SELECT M.MENU_ID , IFNULL(AM.AUTHOR_ID, UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AS AUTHOR_ID , IFNULL(AM.AUTHOR_VALUE, 0) AS AUTHOR_VALUE , CASE WHEN AM.AUTHOR_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS AUTHOR_MAP , M.MENU_UPPER_ID , M.MENU_CODE , M.MENU_NM , M.MENU_DC , M.MENU_TY , M.MENU_SORT , M.MENU_ICON , M.MENU_URI , M.MENU_LEVEL , M.MENU_USE , AM.REGIST_DT , AM.REGIST_ID , AM.UPDT_DT , AM.UPDT_ID FROM SWC_MENU M LEFT JOIN SWC_AUTHOR_MENU AM ON AM.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID AND AM.AUTHOR_ID = UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ORDER BY M.MENU_LEVEL, M.MENU_SORT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SWC_AUTHOR (AUTHOR_ID, AUTHOR_CODE, AUTHOR_NM, AUTHOR_DC, AUTHOR_USE, REGIST_DT, REGIST_ID, UPDT_DT, UPDT_ID) VALUES (UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), UPPER(#{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPPER(#{use, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), NOW(), #{createId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{updateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AUTHOR_CODE = VALUES (AUTHOR_CODE), AUTHOR_NM = VALUES (AUTHOR_NM), AUTHOR_DC = VALUES (AUTHOR_DC), AUTHOR_USE = VALUES (AUTHOR_USE), UPDT_DT = NOW(), UPDT_ID = VALUES (UPDT_ID)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SWC_AUTHOR WHERE AUTHOR_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

DELETE FROM SWC_USER_AUTHOR WHERE AUTHOR_ID = UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND USER_ID = UPPER(#{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

DELETE FROM SWC_AUTHOR_MENU WHERE AUTHOR_ID = UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND MENU_ID = UPPER(#{menuId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SWC_USER_AUTHOR ( USER_ID, AUTHOR_ID, AUTHOR_VALUE, REGIST_DT, REGIST_ID, UPDT_DT, UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{authorityValue, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), #{createId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{updateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AUTHOR_VALUE = VALUES(AUTHOR_VALUE), UPDT_DT = NOW(), UPDT_ID = VALUES(UPDT_ID);

INSERT INTO SWC_AUTHOR_MENU (MENU_ID, AUTHOR_ID, AUTHOR_VALUE, REGIST_DT, REGIST_ID, UPDT_DT, UPDT_ID) VALUES (UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{authorityValue, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), #{createId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{updateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AUTHOR_VALUE = VALUES (AUTHOR_VALUE) , UPDT_DT = NOW(), UPDT_ID = VALUES (UPDT_ID);
